blended.narrative: Lutsen Mountains is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 119 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
